ab: uri sema inu sun?
en: A: Where are you going?

ab: uri vaik aken a temalem ta ljaceng a sema ta ku puljacengan.
en: B: I’m going to plant vegetables in the garden.

ab: anema su kudakudain?
en: A: What are you doing?

ab: uri ku ljivaseng ca namasan cemecemel anga a kadjunangan.
en: B:There’s too much grass, I’m cutting it, I’ll have to water it later.

ab: alapan aken ta dramia kata pitaw.
en: A: Will you get my scythes and hoes, please?

ab: ku pinizua i ljaving ta kakara.
en: A: Put it next to the plow rake.

ab: na kemangekang anga sun?
en: A: Did you turn over the soil?

ab: na kemakang anga ken, uri ku vusaman nusauni.
ch: B:我剛犁過田，待會兒要播種。
en: B: I just turned over the soil, and so on to sow seeds.

ab: maqati anga tjen a kiljaceng?
ch: A:你種的菜可以收成了嗎?
en: A: Are your vegetables ready to be harvested?

ab: amin a qaudriudri a maqati a nu kiljacengen.
en: B: The cabbage here is ready to be harvested, but the Showa grass there is not yet ready to be harvested.

ab: liaw angata a su kinivurasi
en: A: Wow! You dug up so many gourds.

ab: seqetju a pasa kuvkuv aicu a ku kinivurasi.
en: B: Will you help me with the barn?

ab: anema nu kudakudain?
en: A: What are you doing?

ab: qemayuqayu amen i veljeluan, uri kiciqaw amen.
ch: B:我們正在搗魚藤,準備抓魚.
en: I’m pounding the vines for fish.

ab: liaw a ciqaw imaza?
en: A: Are there many fish here?

ab: namapeljuq anga dradrakuyan ta nia kiniciqaw.
en: B: The fish basket has been full of fish.

ab: seman dringay aken ta ku siqaljup
en: B: I usually catch my prey with a trap, but occasionally I hunt with a gun and a dog.

ab: aicu nua vavuy a djekap.
en: A: These are the footprints of the boar, so this is the path the boar took.

ab: aku su sikeljang?
en: B: How do you know?

ab: makeljang tu djinavacan nua vavuy a qelju.
ch: B:看得出來是山豬走過的痕跡。
en: A: I can see the traces of the boar.

ab: ari tjapacunay a tjadringay.
en: A: Go and see our trap, for it seems that we have caught our prey.

ab: nasemequ anga vatu.
en: A: The dog seems to have smelled it. Let’s follow them.

ab: anema su alalangen?
ch: A:你在製作的是什麼東西?
en: A: What are you working on?

ab: aicu a rusung sipudringay ta kulavaw.
ch: B:這是籠子陷阱，用來抓老鼠的。
en: B: This is a cage trap, used to catch rats.

ab: anema nemanga a su pinizua
ch: A:你放在那裡的是什麼東西?
en: A: What is that thing you put there?

ab: aicu sidringadringay ta takec ni kama.
ch: B:這是爸爸專門抓山羌的陷阱。
en: B: It was a leg-rigged rope trap, and we used it to catch Shankiang.

ab: masalu angata ta naqemati, liaw a tja qinaljupan kasauni.
ch: A:感謝祖靈賜福，今天很多獵物。
en: A: Thanks to the blessing of our ancestors, we had a great harvest today.

ab: ui angatalja! masalu aravac tua sinipagaugaw tjanuitjen nua naqemati.
ch: B:是的!非常感謝上主的恩賜!
en: B: Yeah! Let’s take it back to the tribe and share it!
